testcase.name: Intentional failure for report verification

failure.message: failed Intentional failure for report verification

testcase.failure:
Scenario: Intentional failure for report verification
Then the total should be 999
Message:
Expected 999, got 2 (RuntimeError) ./features/step_definitions/calculator_steps.rb:12:in `nil' features/calculator_failures.feature:9:in `the total should be 999'
